About Me

I craft digital solutions with passion

With over 5 years of experience in web development, I specialize in creating scalable and maintainable applications. My journey started with a curiosity for how things work on the internet, which quickly turned into a full-time passion.

When I’m not coding, you can find me exploring new coffee shops, reading about tech trends, or contributing to open-source projects.

My Skills

HTML/CSS JavaScript React Jekyll Tailwind CSS Docker
